title: Hamming Codes
description: Learn about Hamming codes, the first class of perfect error-correcting codes, which efficiently correct single-bit errors using parity checks.
learningObjectives: Construct Hamming codes using parity check matrices
Encode and decode using generator and parity check matrices
Understand syndrome decoding for error correction
Analyze the efficiency of Hamming codes
Connect Hamming codes to quantum CSS codes
